arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names surprise Arsenal star he wishes played for Liverpool
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has insisted Liverpool's lead in the Premier League title race should be much larger, insisting that it would be if Arne Slot had one of Arsenal's star men in his squad

arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs West Ham United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host West Ham United this afternoon in a London derby at the Emirates Stadium. The Gunners have the opportunity to reduce the gap between them and league leaders Liverpool to five points. Mikel Arteta continues to be without the services of attackers Gabriel Jesus, Kai Havertz, Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli. arts.ttl: Arsenal's Premier League title chances officially over if Liverpool beat Man City, legend says
arts.sum: Arsenal's hopes of winning the Premier League will be over if Liverpool overcome Manchester City in Sunday's Premier League showdown, Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could ‘return to charge’ for player – Drama means cut price deal now possible
arts.sum: Arsenal were mentioned as a potential suitor for Atalanta’s Ademola Lookman in the last summer transfer window. There were also indications the Gunners were being used in the saga to attract Paris Saint-Germain’s attention towards the Nigeria international. Lookman’s situation has flared up again over the past few days.
